title: I let Claude Code take my job (it did better than me)
summary: A developer ran an experiment delegating their work to Claude Code to test whether AI could outperform them on real tasks. The video documents what worked, what failed, and workflow comparisons, with results suggesting Claude Code performed competitively or better.
